metaDescription: DeepSeek Coder (DeepSeek), released 2023-11-02 — part of the DeepSeek Coder line. DeepSeek's first model: dense code LLMs (1.3B-33B) trained on 2T code-heavy t…
overview: DeepSeek Coder is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek Coder line. Released 2023-11-02. Code-specialised open-weight line; the original dense models plus the V2 MoE that reached GPT-4-Turbo-level code performance across 338 languages.
What's notable in this version: DeepSeek's first model: dense code LLMs (1.3B-33B) trained on 2T code-heavy tokens.
